mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce discount rates for future corporate earnings, directly increasing present value of S&P 500 cash flows and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, triggering immediate risk-off positioning that drives negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting corporate revenue growth and generating positive quarterly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative 60-day returns in >50% of cases over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and output, which translates to higher corporate profits and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day returns are negative in >65% of rising INDPRO periods across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index exceeding 240 signals entrenched inflation that forces aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: 5-day returns are positive in >60% of threshold-crossing instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising nonfarm payrolls and falling unemployment confirms robust labor market tightening, boosting consumer spending expectations and driving positive monthly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Combined signal yields negative 20-day returns in >55% of observations over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth reflects underlying economic expansion that supports aggregate corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window or positive returns occur in <50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp monthly decline in industrial production combined with falling retail sales indicates a synchronized supply-demand contraction, triggering immediate equity sell-offs and negative weekly returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal.
